case_title: CELIA CAHUICH PECH VS. KITCHIT, INC., A DELAWARE CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF PECH, CELIA CAHUICH AS TO DEFENDANT KITCHIT, INC., A DELAWARE CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PECH, CELIA CAHUICH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KITCHIT, INC., A DELAWARE CORPORATION $6,748.80 PRINCIPAL, $76.84 INTEREST, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,050.64, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
